title: AdoSyncErrors
description: Schema for failed ADO sync operations logged to .governance/state/ado-sync-errors.json. Provides an audit trail of sync failures with retry tracking and resolution status.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this error log schema.

errors.description: Array of sync error records, ordered by timestamp (newest last).

error_id.description: Unique identifier for this error record.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the error occurred.

source.description: Which system originated the change that failed to sync.

github_issue_number.description: GitHub issue number involved in the failed sync, or null if not applicable.

ado_work_item_id.description: ADO work item ID involved in the failed sync, or null if not applicable.

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts made for this operation.

resolved.description: Whether this error has been resolved (successfully retried or manually addressed).
